quote: How people treat you is their karma; how you react is yours.  – Wayne Dyer
fact: Beetles taste like apples, wasps like pine nuts, and worms like fried bacon.
joke: Whenever the cashier at the grocery store asks my dad if he would like the milk in a bag he replies, ‘No, just leave it in the carton!’
